creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: jbeich
Date: Tue Mar  3 20:55:16 UTC 2020
New revision: 527731
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/527731

Log:
  www/cliqz: revert r527481 for this port

  ***** Building *****
  + ./mach build
